activities_projects.title: Map Work on Major River Systems
activities_projects.objective: Understand the distribution of major river systems in India
steps: Take an outline map of India
Locate and mark the Indus, Ganga and Brahmaputra rivers
Label two tributaries for each river
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the locations and tributaries of major river systems

activities_projects.title: Himalayan vs Peninsular Rivers Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Identify differences between the two river systems
steps: Draw a comparison table with two columns
List features of Himalayan rivers
List features of Peninsular rivers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand structural and flow differences between river systems

activities_projects.title: River Features Diagram
steps: Draw a river course from source to mouth
Label features like meander, oxbow lake and delta
Explain each feature briefly

activities_projects.title: Tributary Research Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn about tributaries of major rivers
steps: Choose one major river system
List at least five tributaries
Mention the states through which they flow
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand river systems and tributary networks

activities_projects.title: Peninsular River Basin Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand drainage basins of peninsular rivers
steps: Select a peninsular river such as Godavari or Krishna
Locate its source and mouth
Write the states included in its basin
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand basin distribution of peninsular rivers
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of basin areas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: West Flowing Rivers Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify rivers flowing towards the Arabian Sea
steps: Locate Narmada and Tapi on the map
Trace their direction of flow
Write two features of west flowing rivers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand west flowing river characteristics

activities_projects.title: Lake Classification Activity
activities_projects.objective: Classify lakes into natural and artificial
steps: List ten lakes of India
Identify whether they are natural or man-made
Mention the state where each lake is located
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students classify lakes based on origin

activities_projects.title: Economic Uses of Rivers
activities_projects.objective: Understand the economic importance of rivers
steps: List uses of rivers in agriculture, industry and transport
Explain each use with examples
Write a short paragraph on river-based economy
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of rivers in economic development

activities_projects.title: Flood and River Behavior Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand flood causes in river plains
steps: Identify a river prone to flooding
Write reasons for frequent floods
Suggest measures to reduce flood damage
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand flood dynamics and management

activities_projects.title: River Pollution Survey
steps: List common sources of river pollution
Explain their impact on human health
Suggest three methods to control pollution
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness about water pollution
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and practicality of suggestions (10 marks)
